name: agent-cli-proxy
description: Self-hosted AI API proxy with per-tool usage monitoring, usage attribution, cost tracking, and subscription metadata for OpenAI/Anthropic-compatible APIs.
author: Agent CLI Proxy contributors

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts src/cli.ts --target=bun --outdir=./dist && rm -rf dist/migrations && cp -R src/storage/migrations dist/migrations && mkdir -p dist/data && cp data/plans.default.json dist/data/plans.default.json && bun run scripts/post-build.ts
scripts.release-check: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build && (bunx publint dist || bun run scripts/release-fallback-check.ts)
